title: Can formula expression window get larger?
excerpt: Real simple question. For column type “Formula” is there any way to make the expression window bigger? I have nested IF statements that are killing me. Three lines is not nearly enough.

posts.author: deceiver08 (Devin Doring)
posts.cookedHtml: Real simple question. For column type “Formula” is there any way to make the expression window bigger? I have nested IF statements that are killing me. Three lines is not nearly enough.

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@deceiver08,

I agree that there is room for improvement in the formula editor!

Here’s a method I sometimes use when things get complicated, especially with nested functions:

  • get the formula close to what I want
  • copy the text to Word or other editor
  • make my final edits there
  • copy it back to Monday.

Not a perfect solution but I find that it can sometimes help.

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
